task_desc: Fix feed state food-contact gap and conflicting touch stimulus timers -- (1) feed state immobility: evaluateBehaviorEntry() enters feed state when food is within 50px (hasNearbyFood at main.js:378) but gradual feeding only progresses when dist <= 20px (main.js:1300); since feed state sets targetSpeed = 0 (main.js:516) the fly stops 20-50px from food with proboscis extended but never actually contacts or consumes it; either add slow drift toward food in feed state or tighten the entry threshold to match the contact distance, (2) overlapping touch timers: user touch from applyTouchTool uses setTimeout(2000ms) to clear BRAIN.stimulate.touch (main.js:323-326) while wall collision uses frame-counted wallTouchResetFrame (main.js:1277); if both activate whichever expires first clears the stimulus for both and subsequent wall collisions can prematurely clear user-initiated touch or vice versa; unify to a single timer mechanism or separate the stimulus sources. Files: js/main.js.
